Metadata.description: We help businesses eliminate manual work and grow faster with custom automation systems powered by n8n and AI. Fast results, personal attention, built for your scale.

features.subtitle: We combine the right tools, genuine expertise and real partnership — so you get results that last.

card4.title: Reliable Infrastructure

Metadata.title: Solutions | Oniria Solutions
Metadata.description: Explore Oniria's automation and AI solutions — workflow automation, AI agents, tool integrations and reliable infrastructure built for SMEs and startups.

hero.title:
Intelligence that flows
across your entire stack
hero.subtitle: Purpose-built solutions that combine workflow automation, AI agents, tool integrations and reliable infrastructure — designed for businesses that want real results.

section.title: Everything you need to automate
section.subtitle: Practical, focused solutions that adapt to your business — built with tools you own and can maintain forever.

cards.title: Workflow Automation
cards.description: We design connected flows that eliminate manual tasks across your operations — from lead intake to reporting.

cards.title: AI Agents
cards.description: We deploy agents that classify, decide and act — handling repetitive cognitive work so your team doesn't have to.

cards.title: Tool Integrations
cards.description: We connect the tools you already use — CRM, email, messaging, databases — into a unified, intelligent ecosystem.

cards.title: Reliable Infrastructure
cards.description: Every solution is self-hosted, auditable and owned by you — no usage fees, no vendor lock-in, no surprises.

cta.title: Ready to start automating?
cta.subtitle: Tell us about your business and we'll design a solution that fits your needs and your budget.

HowItWorks.title: How it works
HowItWorks.subtitle: Four focused steps to transform how your business operates

step1.title: We analyze your processes
step1.description: We map your current workflows, identify bottlenecks and design a prioritized automation roadmap tailored to your business.

step2.title: We connect your tools
step2.description: We integrate your existing apps and platforms into one connected, intelligent ecosystem — powered by n8n.

step3.title: We implement AI
step3.description: We deploy AI agents that make decisions, process data and execute tasks — without manual intervention.

step4.title: We scale your business
step4.description: We monitor performance, fix issues proactively and expand your automations as your business grows.

WhyOniria.title: Built differently, for you
WhyOniria.subtitle: We are not a generic agency. We are automation specialists who work alongside you — from the first conversation to long-term results.

pillar1.title: n8n + AI specialists
pillar1.description: We work with proven open-source tools. No vendor lock-in, no black boxes — just reliable, maintainable solutions you own.

pillar2.title: Direct, personal attention
pillar2.description: You work with the people building your solution. No account managers, no call centers — real collaboration from day one.

pillar3.title: Scalable for any stage
pillar3.description: From growing startups to established companies, we design automation systems that adapt to your current scale and evolve with your goals.

pillar4.title: Fast, tangible results
pillar4.description: Your first automation can be live in days, not months. We focus on delivering real value from day one.

analyze.title: We analyze your processes
analyze.subtitle: The first step to automating your business is understanding it deeply. We map everything — then show you exactly where automation delivers the most value.
analyze.what1: Map your current workflows end to end
analyze.what2: Identify bottlenecks, repetitive tasks and manual handoffs
analyze.what3: Estimate time and cost saved by automating each process
analyze.what4: Design a prioritized automation roadmap for your business
analyze.before2: Hours lost on repetitive administrative tasks
analyze.before3: Important information slipping through the cracks
analyze.before4: Team burnout from avoidable manual work
analyze.after1: Data flows automatically between your tools
analyze.after2: Your team focuses on high-value work
analyze.after3: Every process is tracked, auditable and reliable

connect.title: We connect your tools
connect.subtitle: We integrate all your existing apps and platforms into one connected, intelligent ecosystem — powered by n8n as the central hub.
connect.what1: Audit the tools and platforms you already use
connect.what2: Design integration flows with n8n as the central hub
connect.what3: Build bi-directional data sync between your systems
connect.what4: Set up error alerts and monitoring from day one
connect.whyN8n: n8n is an open-source workflow automation platform. Unlike Zapier or Make, n8n can be self-hosted — meaning your data never leaves your infrastructure, and there are no per-task usage fees. We specialize in deploying and customizing n8n for businesses at any scale.

implement.title: We implement AI
implement.subtitle: We deploy AI agents that reason, decide and act — so your team can focus on work that actually needs a human.
implement.what1: Define the scope and decision logic of each AI agent
implement.what2: Connect agents to your data sources and business tools
implement.what3: Implement safety guardrails and human-in-the-loop checkpoints
implement.what4: Test, validate and fine-tune performance before going live
implement.usecase1Desc: AI classifies and assigns inbound leads to the right person — automatically, based on your own criteria.
implement.usecase2Desc: AI agents handle common queries and escalate only what genuinely needs a human.
implement.usecase3Desc: Extract, classify and route data from invoices, forms and emails without touching them manually.
implement.usecase4Desc: Generate first drafts of reports, summaries and updates tailored to your brand voice.
implement.ctaTitle: Ready to put AI to work in your business?

scale.title: We scale your business
scale.subtitle: Automation is not a one-time project. We monitor, optimize and expand your systems as your business grows — continuously.
scale.what1: Monitor all automations with real-time visibility
scale.what2: Proactively detect and fix issues before they impact you
scale.what3: Expand coverage to new processes as your needs evolve
scale.what4: Provide regular performance reports and optimization recommendations
scale.month1Desc: First automations live, quick wins delivered
scale.month3Desc: Core workflows automated, team fully onboarded
scale.month6Desc: Operations running leaner, ready to scale further
scale.result1Desc: Tasks that took hours run in seconds — freeing your team for work that genuinely needs them.
scale.result2Desc: Dashboards and alerts show exactly how your automations are performing, in real time.
scale.result3Desc: Your automations are modular — easy to extend, audit and reshape as your business evolves.
scale.result4Desc: We stay engaged after launch — monitoring, improving and scaling your systems alongside you.

QualifySection.title: Signs your business is ready to automate
QualifySection.subtitle: These patterns show up across industries and company sizes. If any sound familiar, we should talk.
QualifySection.signal1: Your team spends hours each week on tasks that follow the same manual steps every time.
QualifySection.signal2: Your data lives in multiple disconnected tools — and keeping it in sync consumes real time.
QualifySection.signal3: Leads, clients or partners don't get responses as fast as you would like.
QualifySection.signal4: You want to grow your operation without proportionally growing your headcount.
QualifySection.signal5: You lack visibility — no clear reporting on what is actually happening across your business.
QualifySection.signal6: You have tried automation before, but it did not stick or was not built for your real needs.
